steps.title: Identify the student's goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize how many participants selected an altered version. From the notes, that figure is 13.1%.

steps.title: Match the emphasis to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D directly states that “13.1% of participants chose an altered version,” which is exactly the emphasis the student needs.

Choices A, B, and C either emphasize the wrong metric, provide no percentages, or fail to focus on the altered selection.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
